ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the URL visited */,
  "visit_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the visit in nanoseconds since epoch */,
  "from_visit" INTEGER /* Identifier for the previous visit, if applicable */,
  "transition" INTEGER /* Type of transition to this visit */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Segment identifier for user categorization */,
  "visit_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the visit in milliseconds */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the marketing campaign */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the user */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the user's device */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the user's browser */,
  "referrer_url" TEXT /* URL from which the user came */,
  "is_first_visit" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the user's first visit to the site */,
  "exit_page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page where the user exited */,
  "ab_test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the A/B test the user is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_visits_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES user_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_visits_ab_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("ab_test_id") REFERENCES ab_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_visits_exit_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("exit_page_id") REFERENCES urls ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_visits_url_id FOREIGN KEY ("url_id") REFERENCES urls ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_visits_transition FOREIGN KEY ("transition") REFERENCES transitions ("transition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_visits_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_visits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL of the page */,
  "page_title" TEXT /* Title of the page */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the page (e.g., Product, Category, Checkout) */,
  "page_type" TEXT /* Type of page (e.g., product, category, checkout, landing page) */,
  "page_depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the page in the site hierarchy */,
  "is_landing_page" INTEGER /* Indicates if the page is a landing page */,
  "is_checkout_page" INTEGER /* Indicates if the page is a checkout page */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last date the page was modified */,
  "meta_keywords" TEXT /* Meta keywords for the page */,
  "meta_description" TEXT /* Meta description for the page */,
  "canonical_url" TEXT /* Canonical URL for the page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  "segment_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to define the segment (e.g., age, gender, purchase history) */,
  "segment_size" INTEGER /* Number of users in the segment */,
  "segment_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the segment was created */,
  "segment_last_updated" TEXT /* Date the segment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transitions" (
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transition type */,
  "transition_type" TEXT /* Type of transition (e.g., direct, referral) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transition type */,
  "transition_source" TEXT /* Source of the transition (e.g., email, social media, search engine) */,
  "transition_medium" TEXT /* Medium of the transition (e.g., organic, paid, direct) */,
  "transition_campaign" TEXT /* Name of the campaign associated with the transition */,
  "is_first_time_transition" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the first time the user transitioned in this way */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metrics entry */,
  "visit_count" INTEGER /* Total number of visits for the segment on the date */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average visit duration for the segment on the date */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Segment identifier for the metrics */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metrics entry */,
  "unique_visits" INTEGER /* Number of unique visits */,
  "bounced_visits" INTEGER /* Number of visits that resulted in a single page view */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate for the segment */,
  "average_pages_per_visit" REAL /* Average number of pages viewed per visit */,
  "average_time_on_site" REAL /* Average time spent on the site per visit */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate for the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_metrics_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES user_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "campaign_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the campaign (e.g., increase sales, brand awareness) */,
  "campaign_channel" TEXT /* Channel used for the campaign (e.g., email, social media, search engine) */,
  "total_reach" INTEGER /* Total reach of the campaign */,
  "total_clicks" INTEGER /* Total clicks on the campaign */,
  "total_conversions" INTEGER /* Total conversions resulting from the campaign */,
  "cost_per_acquisition" REAL /* Cost per acquisition for the campaign */,
  "return_on_ad_spend" REAL /* Return on ad spend for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visit associated with this engagement */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., click, form submission) */,
  "engagement_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the engagement event */,
  "engagement_value" INTEGER /* Value of the engagement (e.g., 1 for a click, 10 for a form submission) */,
  "engagement_location" TEXT /* Location on the page where the engagement occurred */,
  "engagement_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the engagement in milliseconds */,
  "engagement_content" TEXT /* Content that was engaged with (e.g., product name, article title) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES user_visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ab_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each A/B test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the A/B test */,
  "variant_a" TEXT /* Description of variant A */,
  "variant_b" TEXT /* Description of variant B */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the test */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the test */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., running, completed, paused) */,
  "test_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the test (e.g., increase conversion rate, reduce bounce rate) */,
  "test_hypothesis" TEXT /* Hypothesis being tested */,
  "test_metrics" TEXT /* Key metrics being tracked (e.g., conversion rate, average duration) */,
  "test_winner" TEXT /* Variant that performed better */,
  "test_conclusion" TEXT /* Conclusion of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits by the user */,
  "total_purchases" INTEGER /* Total number of purchases made by the user */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the user */,
  "loyalty_status" TEXT /* Loyalty status of the user (e.g., bronze, silver, gold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view record */,
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the URL being viewed */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the URL */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the view count */,
  "unique_visitors" INTEGER /* Number of unique visitors to the page */,
  "average_time_on_page" REAL /* Average time spent on the page */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate for the page */,
  "exit_rate" REAL /* Exit rate for the page */,
  "page_rank" INTEGER /* Page rank based on popularity and engagement */,
  "page_score" REAL /* Score based on user feedback and engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_views_url_id FOREIGN KEY ("url_id") REFERENCES urls ("url_id")
)
